query:
INSERT INTO performers (name, performerType, imageUrl, bio) VALUES
('Lisa Ann', 'MILF', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/wKodbyuccRsGLxVo.png', 'Legendary mature performer and industry icon with Hall of Fame status. The ultimate MILF.'),
('Piper Perri', 'Girl Next Door', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/IzIYiZDRiJBBuAAm.png', 'Petite blonde performer with girl-next-door charm and specialist niche appeal.'),
('Romi Rain', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/mXtSlweVhinTXTpH.png', 'Tattooed beauty with alternative style and specialist approach. Industry legend.'),
('Karlee Grey', 'Rising Star', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/KQAoGwHRwUxygwJV.png', 'Curvy performer with natural beauty and girl-next-door appeal. Rising star talent.'),
('Kimmy Granger', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/jtAOBBadbMZbtist.png', 'Petite powerhouse with youthful charm and girl-next-door appeal. Industry legend.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
imageUrl = VALUES(imageUrl),
performerType = VALUES(performerType),
bio = VALUES(bio);
